chapter_title.en: Chapter on Performing ʿumrah During the Months of Hajj

text: 2939 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ عَبْدِ اَلرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : «اَلْعُمْرَةُ فِي اَلْعَشْرِ مُتْعَةٌ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2939 - In a narration from Abdul-Rahman ibn Abi Abdullah, from Abu Abdullah (as), he said:
"Umrah performed during the first ten days (of Dhu al-Hijjah) is considered Tamattu‘."
